meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`myit-sb:ServiceRequest` 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (`myit-sb:mp_search_categorizations` )
ON (`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`ServiceRevisionId` = `myit-sb:mp_search_categorizations`.`categorizable_id`)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
Select 
CurrentDate() __time__,
t1.channel __metric__,
sum(CASE WHEN tickets is null then 0 ELSE tickets END) requests 
from (
SELECT DISTINCT
`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Origin` AS channel,
SUM(CASE WHEN `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Display ID` is not null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tickets
FROM
`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case` 
WHERE `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` <= $__to/1000
AND `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Assigned Support Organization` in ($organization)
GROUP BY
`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Origin`
UNION 
SELECT DISTINCT
(CASE 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Direct Inputs' THEN 'Direct Inputs' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Email' THEN 'Email' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'External Escalation' THEN 'External Escalation' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Fax' THEN 'Fax  ' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Self Service' THEN 'Self Service' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Systems Management' THEN 'Systems Management' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Phone' THEN 'Phone' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Voice Mail' THEN 'Voice Mail' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Walk In' THEN 'Walk In' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Web' THEN 'Web' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Other' THEN 'Other' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'BMC Impact Manager Event' THEN 'BMC Impact Manager Event' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Chat' THEN 'Chat' 
END) as channel,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` is not null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tickets
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` in ($organization)
GROUP BY channel) as t1
group by t1.channel

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`myit-sb:ServiceRequest` 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (`myit-sb:mp_search_categorizations` )
ON (`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`ServiceRevisionId` = `myit-sb:mp_search_categorizations`.`categorizable_id`)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
Select 
t1.SubmitDate,
t1.SubmitMonth,
t1.channel,
sum(tickets) requests 
from (
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date`) SubmitDate,
datename('mm',`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date`) AS SubmitMonth,
`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Origin` AS channel,
COUNT(`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Display ID`) AS tickets
FROM
`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case` 
WHERE `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` <= $__to/1000
AND `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Assigned Support Organization` in ($organization)
GROUP BY SubmitDate,SubmitMonth,channel
UNION 
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) SubmitDate,
datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) as SubmitMonth,
(CASE 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Direct Inputs' THEN 'Direct Inputs' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Email' THEN 'Email' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'External Escalation' THEN 'External Escalation' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Fax' THEN 'Fax  ' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Self Service' THEN 'Self Service' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Systems Management' THEN 'Systems Management' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Phone' THEN 'Phone' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Voice Mail' THEN 'Voice Mail' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Walk In' THEN 'Walk In' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Web' THEN 'Web' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Other' THEN 'Other' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'BMC Impact Manager Event' THEN 'BMC Impact Manager Event' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Chat' THEN 'Chat' 
END) as channel,
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS tickets
FROM `HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` in ($organization)
GROUP BY SubmitDate,SubmitMonth,channel
) as t1
group by t1.channel,t1.SubmitMonth,t1.SubmitDate
Order By t1.SubmitDate

Select 
t1.SubmitDate __time__,
(CASE WHEN (t1.channel = 'Digital Workplace' OR t1.channel = 'Chatbot' OR t1.channel = 'Web') THEN 'Self Service (Chatbot, Web, Portal)' 
else 'Service Desk (Email, Phone & Others)' END) __metric__,
sum(tickets) requests 
from (
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date`) SubmitDate,
`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Origin` AS channel,
COUNT(`com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Display ID`) AS tickets
FROM `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case` 
WHERE `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` <= $__to/1000
AND `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Assigned Support Organization` in ($organization)
GROUP BY SubmitDate,channel
UNION 
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) as SubmitDate,
(CASE 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Direct Inputs' THEN 'Direct Inputs' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Email' THEN 'Email' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'External Escalation' THEN 'External Escalation' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Fax' THEN 'Fax  ' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Self Service' THEN 'Self Service' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Systems Management' THEN 'Systems Management' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Phone' THEN 'Phone' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Voice Mail' THEN 'Voice Mail' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Walk In' THEN 'Walk In' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Web' THEN 'Web' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Other' THEN 'Other' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'BMC Impact Manager Event' THEN 'BMC Impact Manager Event' 
WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source` = 'Chat' THEN 'Chat' 
END) as channel,
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS tickets
FROM `HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000
AND channel is not null
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` in ($organization)
GROUP BY SubmitDate,channel
) as t1
group by __metric__,__time__
Order by __time__

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Assigned Support Organization` FROM `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case` WHERE `Assigned Support Organization` is not null AND ( `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `com.bmc.dsm.case-lib:Case`.`Created Date` <= $__to/1000 )UNION SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` from `HPD:Help Desk` WHERE `Assigned Support Organization` is not null AND  (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)"}
list.label: Organization
